name: skills-factory
description: Skills Factory: create, review, and improve reusable skills with a shared skillfactory CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Create, review, and improve reusable skills
interface.longDescription: Skills Factory bundles three sibling skills under one plugin: skill-create (create or update a reusable skill), skill-review (measure a skill with local evaluation runs), and skill-improve (plan bounded improvements from review evidence). All three share the skillfactory CLI and a common set of references.
defaultPrompt: Help me create a reusable skill for ...
Set up a review for this skill.
Propose a bounded improvement from the latest review evidence.
